## Summary

What does this change and why?

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Infrastructure / CI

## Checklist

- [ ] `uv run ruff check .` passes
- [ ] `uv run pytest -q` passes
- [ ] `terraform fmt` + `terraform validate` pass (if Terraform changed)
- [ ] No secrets added; credentials stay in gitignored `terraform.tfvars` / `TF_VAR_*`
- [ ] Commits follow Conventional Commits

## Notes for reviewers

Anything that needs context, or anything verified against live Confluent Cloud.
